title: Stopping Volume After Sharp Selloff
evidence: Fast decline into prior demand zone
Ultra-high volume down bar closes off the low
Next bars fail to continue lower
lesson: High volume alone is not a buy signal; the key is failure to make lower progress after heavy selling.

title: No Demand Before Reversal
evidence: Narrow up bar appears on lower volume
lesson: No demand is strongest when it appears after prior weakness and near a meaningful level.

title: Upthrust at Resistance
evidence: Wide bar closes back under resistance
lesson: A breakout that cannot hold above the level may be a trap, not confirmation.
